name: German Chocolate Cake/Betty Crocker
recipeIngredient: 2 1/4 cups all-purpose flour (or 2 1/2 cups cake flour)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease two 8x8-inch or three 9x9-inch square pans, or three 8x1-1/2-inch or nine 1-1/2-inch round pans. Line the bottoms with parchment paper or waxed paper.
3. Pour boiling water over chocolate and stir until melted. Allow to cool.
4. In a medium bowl, mix sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Beat in egg yolks one at a time.
5. Add melted chocolate and vanilla extract on low speed.
6. In another bowl, mix flour, baking soda, and salt.
7. Alternately add buttermilk and the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, beating after each addition until batter is smooth. Fold in egg whites.
8. Divide batter between pans.
9. Bake 8-inch squares for 45-50 minutes, 9-inch squares for 40-45 minutes, 8-inch rounds for 35-40 minutes, and 9-inch rounds for 30-35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool cakes for 10 minutes.
10. Invert on wire racks and allow to cool completely.
11. Fill layers with frosting and frost top of cake.
